content:
# Recommendations — for plan iter-037

## Priority target: `H_tensor` (1.1.3) — STEP 2.5-d (θ-naturality) then STEP 3 (EW iso)

### 1. Build `htensorComparisonNatTrans` — but phrase it PER-MORPHISM via `HMapFst`, NOT the total endofunctor
**CRITICAL design correction surfaced by the prover.** The total `HFunctorFst` carries `∀ J, Admissible f J F`, which forces every `𝒪_X`-module to be LFP — **not satisfiable in general, downstream-vacuous**. `H_tensor` only has admissibility for the specific `I, F, N`. So:
- Do NOT route the naturality square through the total endofunctor `htensorDomainFunctor`.
- Phrase θ-naturality directly as a per-morphism equation in `HMapFst` (no totality hypothesis), exactly the shape verified in the prover's scaffold:
  `HMapFst f F (hAdm (tensorBC f I N)) (hAdm (tensorBC f I N')) ((tensorBaseChangeFunctor f I).map ψ) ≫ htensorComparison f I F N' … = htensorComparison f I F N … ≫ (tensorLeft (H f I F (hAdm I))).map ψ`.
- STEP 3's abstract-Eilenberg–Watts plan (NatTrans of two `S.Modules` endofunctors) **inherits the same vacuity** — reconsider whether route (a) needs a total endofunctor at all, or restrict `N` to an LFP subcategory.

### 2. θ-naturality proof skeleton (handed off — do NOT retry simp/aesop)
`unfold`/`aesop_cat`/`simp` ALL leave the full square (confirmed this iter). The principled route is **corepresentation reflection**:
- Both sides are maps OUT of the corepresenting object `H(I⊗N,F)`. Apply `(H_represents f (tensorBC f I N) F _).some.hom.app (tensorMod (H f I F (hAdm I)) N')` (a `Type`-bijection) to reduce to an identity of **universal elements** in `(homTensorFunctor f (tensorBC f I N) F).obj (tensorMod (H f I F) N')`.
- Uses: (i) naturality of corepr iso `α_N` + the fact `htensorComparison …N = α_N.inv.app W_N (univ_elt N)` (so `α_N.hom.app W_N` recovers `univ_elt N`); (ii) `tensorAssoc` naturality; (iii) **2nd-slot naturality of the re-typed `External.pullbackTensorComparison`** (now available from @036); expand `HMapFst` via `Functor.map_preimage`.
- Est. 60–120 lines element-chasing. This is the planner's acknowledged tripwire step; the substrate it is phrased against is now fully in place.

### 3. STEP 3 (θ iso / Eilenberg–Watts) — still policy-gated
Needs a SECOND general anchor (route (a): NatTrans of two right-exact ⊕-preserving additive endofunctors of `S.Modules`, iso on `𝒪_S` ⇒ NatIso on quasi-coherent `N`). Adjacent sub-steps: θ_{𝒪}=id needs absent `f^*𝒪_S≅𝒪_X` (KB GAP); the small anchor `External.pullbackUnit` was flagged @035. Decide the EW anchor form alongside item 1's per-morphism reframing.

## Coverage debt (MANDATORY — `dag-query unmatched=3`)
Planner: author blueprint blocks for these 3 prover-created `lean_aux` helpers (no blueprint entry yet). The other three @036 decls were pre-authored and matched.
- `MR0555258CompactifyingPicard.HMapFst` (Basic.lean L1700) — `def:HMapFst` planned but pin missing; object-level functorial action of `H(-,F)` in 1st slot. Deps: `H_represents` (corepr), `coyoneda` full-faithfulness, `homTensorFunctor`.
- `MR0555258CompactifyingPicard.HMapFst_id` (L1710) — functoriality (identity). Deps: `op_id`, `Functor.map_id`, `whiskerLeft_id'`, `Iso.hom_inv_id`, `Functor.preimage_id`.
- `MR0555258CompactifyingPicard.HMapFst_comp` (L1726) — functoriality (composition). Deps: `unop_comp`, `Functor.preimage_comp`, `op_comp`, `Functor.map_comp`, `Functor.whiskerLeft_comp`, `Iso.inv_hom_id_assoc`.
- ALSO: UPDATE the existing `lem:pullbackTensorComparison` statement — it was RE-TYPED @036 from object-level to the single-variable `NatIso` `pullback f ⋙ tensorLeft (f^*A) ≅ tensorLeft A ⋙ pullback f`. Wire `\uses` to the general `f^*`-strong-monoidality fact (parallels `External.sheafifyTensorComparison`).
- Add `% NOTE:` vacuity caveat to `def:HFunctorFst` prose (`∀J,Admissible` carrier not satisfiable in general).

## Blocked — do NOT re-assign
- `ext_finite_flat` (1.10) — infra-blocked (absent internal-ℰxt / R^q f_*). Off-lane until that strand opens.

## Reusable patterns discovered this iter
- **Single-slot anchor re-type over full bifunctor:** when a comparison NatIso is only ever used with one slot fixed, re-type it to the single-variable `NatIso` natural in the *varying* slot — reuses existing `tensorLeft`/`pullback` functors, zero new functor-building, ~100 LOC saved vs the product-category bifunctor.
- **`erw` for id-cancellation across a `⋙`-unfolded functor application** — `rw [Category.id_comp]`/`simp` won't match `… ≫ 𝟙 ≫ …` when the object is `F.obj` vs its `⋙`-unfolding; `erw` (up-to-defeq) lands it.
- **corepr→functor packaging (`HMapFst`):** morphism action = conjugate the precomposition NatTrans `whiskerLeft … (coyoneda.map φ.op)` by the two corepr isos, reflect through `coyoneda.preimage` + `.unop`; functoriality via `← unop_comp` / `← Functor.preimage_comp` / `op_comp` / `Functor.map_comp` / `Functor.whiskerLeft_comp` then middle-iso cancel by `erw [Iso.inv_hom_id_assoc]`.
